## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run validate` (or CI passes)
- [ ] Market name includes the LGA name (e.g. "Balogun Market, Lagos Island")
- [ ] Coordinates are within Nigeria (lat 3–15, lng 1–16)
- [ ] Slug is lowercase with hyphens and globally unique
